death_quotes.text: The brave die never, though they sleep in dust: Their courage nerves a thousand living men.
death_quotes.author: Minot J. Savage

death_quotes.text: It is not length of life, but depth of life.
death_quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

death_quotes.text: Death is not the greatest loss in life. The greatest loss is what dies inside us while we live.
death_quotes.author: Norman Cousins

death_quotes.text: To the well-organized mind, death is but the next great adventure.
death_quotes.author: J.K. Rowling, Harry Potter

death_quotes.text: I'm not afraid of death; I just don't want to be there when it happens.
death_quotes.author: Woody Allen

death_quotes.text: The fear of death follows from the fear of life. One who lives fully is prepared to die at any time.
death_quotes.author: Mark Twain

death_quotes.text: Death ends a life, not a relationship.
death_quotes.author: Mitch Albom

death_quotes.text: Even death is not to be feared by one who has lived wisely.
death_quotes.author: Buddha

death_quotes.text: Our dead are never dead to us, until we have forgotten them.
death_quotes.author: George Eliot

death_quotes.text: What we have done for ourselves alone dies with us; what we have done for others and the world remains and is immortal.
death_quotes.author: Albert Pike

death_quotes.text: Death is only the end if you assume the story is about you.
death_quotes.author: Welcome to Night Vale

death_quotes.text: It is said that your life flashes before your eyes just before you die. That is true, it's called Life.
death_quotes.author: Terry Pratchett

death_quotes.text: Do not pity the dead. Pity the living, and above all, those who live without love.
death_quotes.author: J.K. Rowling, Harry Potter

death_quotes.text: A thing is not necessarily true because a man dies for it.
death_quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

death_quotes.text: Death must be so beautiful. To lie in the soft brown earth, with the grasses waving above one's head.
death_quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

death_quotes.text: They say you die twice. One time when you stop breathing and a second time when somebody says your name for the last time.
death_quotes.author: Banksy

death_quotes.text: The life of the dead is placed in the memory of the living.
death_quotes.author: Marcus Tullius Cicero

death_quotes.text: While I thought that I was learning how to live, I have been learning how to die.
death_quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

death_quotes.text: Death is not extinguishing the light; it is only putting out the lamp because the dawn has come.
death_quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

death_quotes.text: No one is actually dead until the ripples they cause in the world die away.
death_quotes.author: Terry Pratchett

death_quotes.text: Only the good die young.
death_quotes.author: Billy Joel
